global_config.style_prefix: dark fantasy, fallen angel themed, sacred ruins aesthetic, Angel Fallen survivor roguelike
global_config.style_suffix: high contrast, no text, no watermark, game-ready, readable at small scale
global_config.image_suffix: top-down 2D game asset concept, clear silhouette, transparent background when applicable
global_config.sfx_suffix: short game sound effect, clean transient, no long reverb tail, no vocal

tasks.prompt: char_knight, armored frontline knight, holy lance, sturdy posture, readable top-down silhouette, sacred silver armor with muted gold highlights
char_mage, arcane caster, floating spell focus, robe silhouette, blue violet arcane glow, readable top-down body shape
char_rogue, agile shadow rogue, dual dagger outline, low stance, dark cloak, readable top-down silhouette, not confused with enemies
enemy_shadowling, small corrupted shadow creature, chapter 1 hostile, hunched dark silhouette, readable danger shape distinct from player
enemy_brute, large corrupted brute enemy, heavy shoulders, slow tank silhouette, chapter 1 stone shadow corruption, readable at 48 pixels
wpn_holy_cross projectile, bright holy cross bolt, gold white sacred light, simple readable projectile icon, distinct from enemy attacks
wpn_reliquary_orb projectile, small orbiting relic orb, ivory metal and pale blue glow, readable circular projectile for survivor orbit weapon
wpn_solar_lance projectile, narrow solar lance beam icon, warm gold and white core, readable long projectile, player-safe color language
wpn_sacred_lance projectile, sacred lance bolt, pale gold spear-like projectile, clean outline, player weapon readable at 32 pixels
ui_hud_health_icon, compact health icon, sacred heart and silver frame, dark fantasy UI, transparent background, readable at 24 pixels
ui_hud_xp_icon, compact experience shard icon, memory crystal, blue white glow, dark fantasy UI, transparent background, readable at 24 pixels
pickup_xp_small, short magical pickup chime, memory shard sparkle, bright but gentle, suitable for frequent survivor game pickups
weapon_impact_light, dark fantasy holy projectile impact, crisp hit, small burst of sacred light, short combat feedback
enemy_kill, short enemy defeat sound, corrupted spirit dissolving, soft ash burst, readable combat feedback, not gore
